Participant: Identifier for the participant from whom the sample was taken.
Experiment: Identifier for the specific experiment or study.
Channel: Identifier for the channel or specific measurement type.
Type: Type of sample, e.g., tumor or normal adjacent tissue.
Aliquot: Unique identifier for the aliquot of the sample.
Age: Age of the individual in years.
Gender: Gender of the individual, specified as 'male' or 'female'.
Ethnicity: Ethnicity of the individual, primarily 'caucasian' in this sample.
Height.cm: Height of the individual in centimeters.
Weight.kg: Weight of the individual in kilograms.
BMI: Body Mass Index of the individual.
Cigarettes.per.Day: Number of cigarettes smoked per day by the individual.
Pack.Years.Smoked: Cumulative years of smoking, measured in pack-years.
Smoking.History: Detailed smoking history of the individual.
Secondhand.Smoke: History of exposure to secondhand smoke.
Smoking.Score.WGS: Quantitative measure of smoking impact on genetic samples.
Smoking.Signature.Fraction.WGS: Fraction of smoking-related genetic signatures in samples.
Dominant.Signature.WGS.notSmoking.50perc: Dominant non-smoking genetic signature in samples.
Dominant.Signature.Fraction.WGS.notSmoki: Fraction of dominant non-smoking genetic signature.
DNP.GG.to.TT.or.CC.to.AA.Count.WGS: Count of specific genetic mutations in samples.
NMF.consensus: Consensus cluster assigned by Non-negative Matrix Factorization.
NMF.cluster.membership: Membership probability in clusters by Non-negative Matrix Factorization.
mRNA.Expression.Subtype.TCGA: mRNA expression subtype classification of samples.
mRNA.stemness.index: Index indicating stemness level based on mRNA expression.
CIMP.status: CpG Island Methylator Phenotype status of samples.
Tumor.Purity.byESTIMATE.RNAseq: Estimated tumor purity from RNA sequencing data.
TSNet Purity: Tumor purity estimate using TSNet method.
ESTIMATEScore: Overall ESTIMATE score indicating tumor microenvironment activity.
ESTIMATE ImmuneScore: Score reflecting immune cell infiltration in tumor microenvironment.
ESTIMATE StromalScore: Score indicating stromal cell presence in tumor microenvironment.
QC.status: Quality control status of the sample (pass/fail).
TP53.mutation: Type of mutation in TP53 gene (e.g., missense, nonsense).
KRAS.mutation: Type of mutation in KRAS gene (e.g., missense, in-frame deletion).
STK11.mutation: Type of mutation in STK11 gene (e.g., splice site, nonsense).
EGFR.mutation: Type of mutation in EGFR gene (e.g., missense, in-frame deletion).
KEAP1.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in KEAP1 gene (e.g., Nonsense_Mutation, Missense_Mutation).
RB1.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in RB1 gene (e.g., Splice_Site, Nonsense_Mutation).
BRAF.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in BRAF gene, predominantly Missense_Mutation.
ARAF.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in ARAF gene, predominantly Missense_Mutation.
ERBB2.mutation: Type of genetic mutation in ERBB2 gene, In_Frame_Ins observed.
TP53.mutation.status: Status indicating presence (1) or absence (0) of TP53 mutation.
KRAS.mutation.status: Status indicating presence (1) or absence (0) of KRAS mutation.
STK11.mutation.status: Status indicating presence (1) or absence (0) of STK11 mutation.
EGFR.mutation.status: Status indicating presence (1) or absence (0) of EGFR mutation.
KEAP1.mutation.status: Status indicating presence (1) or absence (0) of KEAP1 mutation.
RB1.mutation.status: Status indicating presence or absence of RB1 gene mutation.
BRAF.mutation.status: Status indicating presence or absence of BRAF gene mutation.
ARAF.mutation.status: Status indicating presence or absence of ARAF gene mutation.
ERBB2.mutation.status: Status indicating presence or absence of ERBB2 gene mutation.
Total.Mutation.Count.WGS: Total count of mutations identified through whole-genome sequencing.
Mutation.Count.ExcludingINDELs.WGS: Count of mutations excluding insertions and deletions from whole-genome sequencing.
Total.DNP.Count.WGS: Total count of dinucleotide mutations from whole-genome sequencing.
Mutation.Signature.Activity.W1.COSMIC5: Activity level of mutation signature W1 from COSMIC5 database.
Mutation.Signature.Activity.W2.COSMIC4: Activity level of mutation signature W2 from COSMIC4 database.
Mutation.Signature.Activity.W3.COSMIC2: Quantitative measure of mutation signature activity in samples.
ALK.fusion: Binary indicator of ALK gene fusion presence (0: absent, 1: present).
ROS1.fusion: Binary indicator of ROS1 gene fusion presence (0: absent, 1: present).
RET.fusion: Binary indicator of RET gene fusion presence (0: absent, 1: present).
Putative.driver.mutation: Identified putative driver mutation, typically a gene fusion.
Methylation.QC: Quality control status for methylation analysis (pass/fail).
Dominant.Histological.Subtype: Dominant histological subtype observed in the sample.
